name: braze-cli-monorepo
description: Unofficial Braze CLI + Claude Code skill monorepo

scripts.build: npm run -w @braze-oss/core build && npm run -w @braze-oss/installer build && npm run -w @braze-oss/mcp build && npm run -w @braze/cli build
scripts.test: npm run -w @braze-oss/core test && npm run -w @braze-oss/installer test && npm run -w @braze-oss/mcp test && npm run -w @braze/cli test
scripts.lint: npm run -w @braze-oss/core lint && npm run -w @braze-oss/installer lint && npm run -w @braze-oss/mcp lint && npm run -w @braze/cli lint
